category_sources: source_facts.description says tools for fixed-width bitmap fonts; official PSF Tools page describes conversion to and from PSF bitmap font formats.
display_name_sources: Official homepage title is PSF Tools; source_facts.name is psftools.
docs_sources: Official Seasip PSF Tools page is the project's primary documentation and download surface.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is empty; official homepage and source archive are on seasip.info, but no official source-control repository URL is presented in source_facts or the official page.
tags_sources: source_facts.executables list many PSF conversion tools; official homepage lists supported bitmap font input and output formats.
